task_completion.description: Load the input country boundaries shapefile into the GIS application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The layer 'ne_50m_admin_0_countries' is visible in the Layers panel or map canvas of a GIS application (e.g., QGIS).
A dialog box for 'Simplify' or 'Simplify geometries' is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Configure the simplification tool with the Douglas-Peucker method and 0.05 degree tolerance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Simplify dialog, the tolerance field is set to '0.05' and the method is set to 'Douglas-Peucker' (or distance-based algorithm).

task_completion.description: Run the simplification process to generate a simplified geometry layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new layer (e.g., 'Simplified') appears in the Layers panel, or a progress bar/log indicates the simplification process completed.

task_completion.description: Configure the export settings for the simplified layer to GeoJSON with EPSG:4326.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Vector Layer as...' or 'Export' dialog is open. The Format is set to 'GeoJSON', the CRS is set to 'EPSG:4326', and the File name/path is set to '/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/countries_simplified.geojson'.

task_completion.description: Successfully export the simplified GeoJSON file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message (e.g., 'Layer exported successfully') is visible, or the newly exported 'countries_simplified' layer appears in the Layers panel.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface of a GIS application to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a GIS GUI (like QGIS) rather than terminal commands (like ogr2ogr) or Python scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent actually used a simplification tool rather than just renaming or re-exporting the original file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Simplify' tool dialog is clearly visible in at least one screenshot with the correct parameters entered.

integrity.description: The agent did not use the terminal to mock the output file.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are open showing commands like 'touch /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/countries_simplified.geojson' or 'cp'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input dataset is the Natural Earth 50m Admin 0 Countries shapefile (242 features, 99,613 vertices). The task requires applying the Douglas-Peucker simplification method with a tolerance of 0.05 degrees. The output must be exported as a GeoJSON file to '/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/countries_simplified.geojson' using the EPSG:4326 (WGS 84) Coordinate Reference System. A successful simplification should preserve at least 200 features and achieve at least a 30% reduction in vertices (targeting ~70,000 vertices).
